violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as cooked eggs) in the walk-in refrigerator in the market. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2025

Spinach and potato pastries observed held at 69-70 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2025
Turkey bacon observed marked with a date exceeding 7 days. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2025
